name: Chocolate Crumb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the flour and sugar.
4. Remove 1/2 cup of this mixture and set aside.
5. Stir the baking soda, baking powder, and salt into the remaining flour mixture.
6. Add the butter, egg, milk, and chocolate syrup to the flour mixture. Beat until well blended.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Sprinkle the reserved flour mixture over the top of the cake.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until done. Serve warm or at room temperature.
